description: Fix CustomersView layout: move status filter tabs beside the search input on the same row. Redesign the users page to be more professional (Pasargad/Marzban-style) with compact inline layout, better visual hierarchy, and i18n for all hardcoded strings.
steps: In panel/web/admin/src/views/CustomersView.vue, combine the status-tabs nav and search-bar into a single flex row (.filter-row) that places the status tabs on the left and search input on the right, side by side.
Replace all hardcoded English strings in the template with t() calls (statusTabs labels, mainTabs labels, bulk toolbar text, placeholder text, 'New User' button, confirm dialog text).

Add the corresponding i18n keys to panel/web/admin/src/i18n.ts for all 3 locales (en, fa, zh): 'customers.all', 'customers.active', 'customers.online', 'customers.limited', 'customers.disabled', 'customers.expired', 'customers.tab_customers', 'customers.tab_archived', 'customers.tab_resellers', 'customers.search', 'customers.search_archived', 'customers.new_user', 'customers.archived_desc', 'customers.selected', 'customers.clear', 'customers.enable', 'customers.disable', 'customers.traffic_reset', 'customers.delete', 'customers.confirm_delete_title', 'customers.confirm_delete_msg', 'customers.deleted_success', 'customers.deleted_error', 'customers.bulk_success', 'customers.bulk_error', 'customers.bulk_partial'.
Make the filter-row responsive: on mobile (max-width: 640px) stack vertically with status tabs scrollable horizontally and search full-width below.
Style the status tabs as compact pill-style buttons to match professional panels (smaller padding, subtle active indicator, no underline border).
acceptance_criteria: Status filter tabs and search input appear on the same row in CustomersView
All user-facing text uses t() function calls
The layout is responsive - stacks on mobile
findings: Both vue-tsc --noEmit and vite build pass. Used computed() for mainTabs, statusTabs, and columns so labels update reactively when locale changes. Added 27 new i18n keys across all 3 locales. The filter-row uses flexbox with responsive stacking at 640px. Status tabs use pill/rounded style. Actual path is panel/panel/web/admin/ (double panel dir).
